title: puya alpestris subsp. zoellneri
intro: Puya alpestris subsp. zoellneri is a plant species within the Bromeliaceae family, commonly known as the Andean puya, which is native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Puya alpestris subsp. zoellneri include its potential to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Puya alpestris subsp. zoellneri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
